steps.title: Identify the key distinction to emphasize
steps.content: The notes show that Pipturus albidus is native while Psidium cattleyanum is non-native. This origin difference is what the student needs to highlight.

steps.title: Match the distinction to the answer choices
steps.content: Choice B states “only the former plant is native,” which effectively highlights that one is native and one is not—precisely what the student needs to accomplish. The other choices either ignore one plant (A), focus on the study method (C), or highlight what the plants share instead of what differs (D). That matches choice B — B is correct.
